items.text: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts total number of currently active service requests

items.text: When inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery ensures no secondary collision, decision shall be ACAS

items.text: When numberServicesTrue >= 2, outDec shall use dynamic decision result

items.text: Otherwise, outDec shall fall back to static priority-based decision
